name: Sweet 'n Sour Tuna Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Water-packed tuna, drained and broken into chunks
2 cups Cooked long grain rice (white or brown)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine vinegar, sugar, salt, pepper and 1 tablespoon of reserved tuna liquid.
2. In a large bowl, combine remaining ingredients; add vinegar mixture and toss.
3. Let stand for 10 minutes; toss again and serve.
Each serving (1-1/2 cups) provides:
2-1/4 vitamins, 1 mineral, 1-1/4 protein
Per serving:
274 calories, 22 grams protein, 4 grams carbohydrates
0 grams fat: 0 polyunsaturated, 0 monounsaturated, 0 saturated
538 milligrams sodium, 24 milligrams cholesterol
